panels.description: Medium shot: A pale woman ('She') sits hunched in a crowded, dimly lit train compartment, clutching herself, her face etched with profound distress and overwhelming anxiety. Her eyes are wide with fear, perhaps looking out a window with a faint, peaceful memory of Stanmore overlaid. Muted, melancholic lighting creates a sense of dread and desperation.

bubbles.text: I can't... I can't trust myself friendless in a foreign country!
Stanmore... always safe at Stanmore... George is there...

panels.description: Wide shot: A bustling, chaotic beach scene at a crowded port. 'My brother', with a strained but determined expression, gently but firmly guides a resisting 'She' towards a steamboat's gangway. The steamboat itself is already packed with anxious passengers on its deck, some eating meager meals. Overcast sky and choppy waters reflect the pervasive anxiety.

bubbles.text: With the greatest difficulty, they boarded the steamboat, a temporary refuge from the escalating fear. The decks were dangerously crowded.

panels.description: Medium shot: From the steamboat deck, 'my brother' and other passengers look towards the distant horizon with growing alarm. In the background, a warship (ironclad) fires a small gun, a distinct puff of smoke erupting from its funnels, and signal flags are hoisted. Further out, ominous silhouettes of three more ironclads rise from the hazy sea, trailing black smoke. The atmosphere is tense and foreboding. SFX: 'BOOM! BOOM! (distant)'.

bubbles.text: The ominous sound of guns grew louder from the south, and more ships appeared, warning of something terrible.

panels.description: Dynamic wide shot: The distant, hazy Essex coast provides a backdrop. 'My brother', leaning forward against the bulwark, his face a mask of dawning horror and disbelief, points towards a massive, towering Martian Tripod. It is small and faint in the remote distance, but its monstrous, mechanical form is clearly identifiable, advancing along the muddy coast, its legs high above trees and church towers. A column of dark smoke rises behind it. The sense of scale and impending doom is immense.

bubbles.text: Then, a sight that froze every heart aboard...
A column of smoke... No, a *shape*!

panels.description: Close-up: The captain's face, contorted in a primal scream of terror and rage, sweat dripping, his hand violently gripping the ship's wheel. Below, a fragmented montage of terrified passenger faces, mouths agape, pointing frantically towards the distant Martian. A focused close-up on 'my brother's' eyes, wide with a complex mix of primal fear and transfixed horror as he watches the advancing alien. Dynamic, chaotic lines emphasize the panic. SFX: 'GASPS! SCREAMS!'.

bubbles.text: MAYDAY! IT'S HERE! Damn my delay!

panels.description: Panoramic wide shot from the steamboat's perspective. Across the vast expanse of the estuary, now multiple Martian Tripods are visible, striding relentlessly seaward through muddy flats and over sparse land, converging on the mass of ships. In the foreground, the "crescent of shipping" is a scene of utter pandemonium: ships collide, turn frantically, steam whistles loudly, and small launches dart in a desperate, chaotic attempt to escape. Dramatic, dark smoke billows from the panicked vessels.

bubbles.text: More Titans emerged, and the escape became a desperate scramble across the panicked waters.

panels.description: Dynamic medium shot, slightly low angle. 'My brother' is violently thrown off his feet, mid-air, as the steamboat sharply swerves to avoid a collision. His body is in motion, almost blurred, but his gaze remains fixed, mesmerized and horrified, on the distant, advancing Martian threat. Debris and agitated passengers are blurred in the background, but his intense focus on the danger is sharp. SFX: 'CRASH! THUD!'.

bubbles.text: Even as I fell... I couldn't tear my eyes away...
